slides.headline: 9:42pm. Burst pipe. She’s panicking.
slides.body: Your phone’s buzzing face-down in the brick dust. Swipe.

slides.headline: You’re asleep. Fair enough.
slides.body: You did 11 hours today. Nobody answers the phone at quarter to ten.

slides.label: how long she waited before ringing the next plumber

slides.headline: He picked up. You didn’t.
slides.body: Emergency call-out, same night. She never rings you back — why would she?

slides.label: that one call was worth. Gone. You’ll never know it happened.

slides.headline: The most expensive sound in your business is a phone ringing out.
Unless someone picked up.
